creator: timur@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Hi, Dirk! 

Thanks for your patches, I've commited the fixes with recent versions of 
samba32  and samba33. I don't think the change is serious enough to bump 
the revision of samba3, but if the new release will come, I change the 
dependency there as well. 

Thanks, 
Timur.
